since_last: 56% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.18%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC +0.71% · Gold -0.02% · Nasdaq100 +0.26%. 56% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.18%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.18%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.43%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +4.81%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +4.81%, MDB +4.23%, PUBM +3.93%, TER +3.91%, MRVL +3.75%. Laggards: ORCL -3.19%, DELL -3.03%, TLN -2.88%, TSLA -2.79%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.21% at $121.25
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.21% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
